title: Charred Cozy Portuguese Blackcurrant Tart
description: A sweet and tangy Portuguese tart featuring blackcurrant jam, with a charred and molten center, served on a traditional talavera plate. This dessert is perfect for a cozy evening.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
Roll out the puff pastry on a lightly floured surface to a thickness of about 1/8 inch.
In a small bowl, whisk together the eggs, sugar, and vanilla extract.
Spread the blackcurrant jam over the center of the pastry, leaving a 1 inch border around the edges.
Fold the edges of the pastry up over the jam, pressing gently to seal.
Brush the melted butter over the pastry, making sure to stay within the edges.
Sprinkle the salt over the pastry, then use a knife or kitchen torch to create a decorative edge.
Place the tart on a talavera plate and bake for 25 minutes, or until the pastry is golden brown and the center is molten.
Remove the tart from the oven and let it cool for 5 minutes before serving.
